title: Feur Builder
description: Add more than 300 varieties of your favorite vanilla blocks !
body:
![Feur Builder](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/001e7fa1bfe10da64ea6708abbbf6054b7117053.png)

## ~ A mod that adds a lot of vanilla block variant ~
 Powerful variety of colors and extensions for blocks that will add diversity to your constructions !

 New varieties of :

- Stone
- Andesite
- Diorite
- Granite
- Bricks
- New Wood
- Sea Lantern
- Dirt Path
- flowers and more...
